title: Hoplite For PVP
description: Hoplite For PVP is a edited uku's pvp modpack to better work with hoplite
body:
A little modpack about Hoplite!

# **Fps/preformance**
# 
Hoplite pvp requiers a decent pc but still provides amazing FPS, no matter if you're on a laptop to a gaming pc fps is no worry.

# **Texture packs**

I included lots of texture packs to not change much about the game but mmake it feel more UHC
_(and you can swap out these pack to your liking!_

# **credits**
this modpack is a remake of [Ukus pvp modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ukupvp) with more UHC mods
_note i tryed to contact uku but I cant find much_
